design_philosophy.emotion: Warmth, calm, organization, and elegant family life.
design_philosophy.layout_strategy: Spacious layout using large rounded cards with generous padding (p-8 to p-12). Soft, high-end shadows. Floating, cardless inner elements where possible.
anti_patterns: No default Inter font for headings

dashboard_cards.active_card: col-span-1 lg:col-span-2 bg-white rounded-3xl shadow-[0_16px_40px_-16px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)] p-6 sm:p-8 border border-[#E5E2DC]
dashboard_cards.coming_soon_card: relative overflow-hidden bg-[#F3F0EA]/50 rounded-3xl p-8 flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[240px] border border-[#E5E2DC]/50 transition-all hover:bg-[#F3F0EA]/80 group
dashboard_cards.coming_soon_overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-white/40 backdrop-blur-[2px] flex items-center justify-center flex-col z-10

calendar_grid.header_cell: py-2 text-center text-xs font-semibold text-[#7A7571] uppercase tracking-wider
calendar_grid.grid_body: grid grid-cols-7 auto-rows-fr gap-px bg-[#E5E2DC] border border-[#E5E2DC] rounded-xl overflow-hidden
calendar_grid.day_cell: relative h-28 sm:h-36 bg-white transition-colors hover:bg-[#FBFBF9] p-1 flex flex-col gap-1 cursor-pointer
calendar_grid.merged_split_wife: absolute top-0 left-0 right-0 h-1/2 border-t-[3px] border-l-[3px] border-r-[3px] border-[#F472B6] rounded-t-lg
calendar_grid.merged_split_husband: absolute bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-1/2 border-b-[3px] border-l-[3px] border-r-[3px] border-[#60A5FA] rounded-b-lg

event_bar.base: w-full text-[10px] sm:text-xs px-2 py-1 rounded-md truncate font-medium z-10 relative cursor-pointer transition-all hover:brightness-95 hover:scale-[1.02]
event_bar.overflow_indicator: text-[10px] font-semibold text-[#7A7571] px-1 mt-1 z-10 relative

popover_modal.content: z-50 bg-white/95 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_24px_64px_-24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.16)] p-6 min-w-[320px] max-w-sm

user_switcher.container: inline-flex items-center gap-1 bg-[#F3F0EA] p-1.5 rounded-full shadow-inner
user_switcher.pill_active: px-6 py-2 bg-white rounded-full shadow-sm text-sm font-semibold text-[#2D2A26] transition-all
user_switcher.pill_inactive: px-6 py-2 text-[#7A7571] text-sm font-medium hover:text-[#2D2A26] transition-all cursor-pointer

merge_toggle.wrapper: flex items-center gap-3 bg-white border border-[#E5E2DC] px-4 py-2 rounded-full shadow-sm

interactions_and_motion.hover_effects: Interactive elements should slightly lift (`-translate-y-[2px]`) and increase shadow opacity. Event bars should slightly scale up (`scale-[1.02]`).
interactions_and_motion.calendar_merge: Use framer-motion to animate the rendering of the pink/blue split borders (e.g., animate path length or scale/opacity).
interactions_and_motion.popover_entrance: Animate popover appearing from the clicked day cell with spring physics, or use a soft fade-in with slide-up (`initial={{opacity: 0, y: 10}} animate={{opacity: 1, y: 0}}`).

images.description: Happy family warm lifestyle home - useful for empty states, welcome modal, or profile background.
Minimalist warm home interior - useful for login page background or app wrapper texture.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5, matching the warm #2D2A26 or #7A7571 colors.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use 'framer-motion' for all fluid transitions, especially for the 'Merge Calendars' toggle and the day-cell popovers.
Use Shadcn UI for the Popover, Dialog (for event creation), and Switch, but override their default styles to match the warm, spacious, rounded-3xl aesthetic defined here.

For the Merge Calendars view: Create the grid cell as a relative container. Insert two absolute divs inside it for the borders (one taking the top 50% with border-t/l/r pink-400 and rounded-t-lg, and one taking the bottom 50% with border-b/l/r blue-400 and rounded-b-lg). Set pointer-events-none on these border overlays. Inside the cell, use two 50%-height flex containers to list the wife's events at the top and the husband's events at the bottom.
Event colors: Allow users to pick any free color for their events. Ensure the text inside the event bar has sufficient contrast (use white or black depending on the background color luminance).

Day Detail Popover: Ensure this is a floating popover positioned near the clicked day, NOT a fixed bottom panel. It should list all events for that day with their time, title, category, notes, and owner.
Data Structure: Events should have {id, title, typeId, userId, color, date, startTime, endTime, description}. Event Types should be a separate CRUD managed list {id, name, color}.
Implement Progressive Web App (PWA) configuration (manifest.json, service worker for basic offline caching) as requested by the user.
Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are placed on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, day cells, popover items).
